instruction: Create a Blueprint that on overlap casts to Character. If cast succeeds, print Player. If cast fails, print Not A Player.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_SafeCast
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToCharacter
NODE n3: PrintString [InString="Player"]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Not A Player"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n3.Execute
EXEC n2.CastFailed -> n4.Execute
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CastCheck
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToCharacter
NODE n3: PrintString [InString="Player"]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Not A Player"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n3.Execute
EXEC n2.CastFailed -> n4.Execute
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CastCheck
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToCharacter
NODE n3: PrintString [InString="Player"]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Not A Player"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n3.Execute
EXEC n2.CastFailed -> n4.Execute

instruction: Create a Blueprint that on overlap casts the other actor to Pawn. If cast succeeds get the pawn's controller and print its name. If cast fails print Unknown.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CastToPawn
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToPawn
NODE n3: GetController
NODE n4: GetDisplayName
NODE n5: PrintString
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="Unknown"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n5.Execute
DATA n2.AsPawn -> n3.Target [Pawn]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Target [Controller]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.InString [String]
EXEC n2.CastFailed -> n6.Execute
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CastToPawn
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToPawn
NODE n3: GetController
NODE n4: GetDisplayName
NODE n5: PrintString
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="Unknown"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n5.Execute
DATA n2.AsPawn -> n3.Target [Pawn]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Target [Controller]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.InString [String]
EXEC n2.CastFailed -> n6.Execute

NODE n4: GetDisplayName
NODE n5: PrintString

instruction: Create a Blueprint with a float variable Speed. On overlap cast to Character. If success, get character movement component and set max walk speed to Speed variable.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_SetSpeed
PARENT: Actor
VAR Speed: Float = 600.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToCharacter
NODE n3: GetCharacterMovement
NODE n4: VariableGet [VarName=Speed]
NODE n5: SetMaxWalkSpeed
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n5.Execute
DATA n2.AsCharacter -> n3.Target [Character]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.Target [CharacterMovementComponent]
DATA n4.Value -> n5.MaxWalkSpeed [Float]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_SetSpeed
PARENT: Actor
VAR Speed: Float = 600.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToCharacter
NODE n3: GetCharacterMovementComponent
NODE n4: VariableGet [VarName=Speed]
NODE n5: SetMaxWalkSpeed
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Object [Actor]
EXEC n2.CastSucceeded -> n5.Execute
DATA n2.AsCharacter -> n3.Target [Character]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.Target [CharacterMovementComponent]
DATA n4.Value -> n5.MaxWalkSpeed [Float]
raw_output:

GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: CastToCharacter
NODE n3: GetCharacterMovementComponent
NODE n4: VariableGet [VarName=Speed]
NODE n5: SetMaxWalkSpeed

NODE n5: PrintString [InString="Done"]

EXEC n2.B -> n4.Execute
EXEC n2.C -> n5.Execute

instruction: Create a Blueprint with float variables X, Y, Z. On BeginPlay use a Sequence with 4 outputs. A prints X, B prints Y, C prints Z, D prints the sum of all three.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_PrintCoords
PARENT: Actor
VAR X: Float = 1.0
VAR Y: Float = 2.0
VAR Z: Float = 3.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: Sequence
NODE n3: VariableGet [VarName=X]
NODE n4: PrintString
NODE n5: VariableGet [VarName=Y]
NODE n6: PrintString
NODE n7: VariableGet [VarName=Z]
NODE n8: PrintString
NODE n9: AddFloat
NODE n10: AddFloat
NODE n11: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.A -> n4.Execute
DATA n3.Value -> n4.InString [String]
EXEC n2.B -> n6.Execute
DATA n5.Value -> n6.InString [String]
EXEC n2.C -> n8.Execute
DATA n7.Value -> n8.InString [String]
EXEC n2.D -> n11.Execute
DATA n3.Value -> n9.A [Float]
DATA n5.Value -> n9.B [Float]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n10.A [Float]
DATA n7.Value -> n10.B [Float]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n11.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_PrintCoords
PARENT: Actor
VAR X: Float = 1.0
VAR Y: Float = 2.0
VAR Z: Float = 3.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: Sequence
NODE n3: VariableGet [VarName=X]
NODE n4: PrintString
NODE n5: VariableGet [VarName=Y]
NODE n6: PrintString
NODE n7: VariableGet [VarName=Z]
NODE n8: PrintString
NODE n9: AddFloat
NODE n10: AddFloat
NODE n11: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.A -> n4.Execute
DATA n3.Value -> n4.InString [String]
EXEC n2.B -> n6.Execute
DATA n5.Value -> n6.InString [String]
EXEC n2.C -> n8.Execute
DATA n7.Value -> n8.InString [String]
EXEC n2.D -> n11.Execute
DATA n3.Value -> n9.A [Float]
DATA n5.Value -> n9.B [Float]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n10.A [Float]
DATA n7.Value -> n10.B [Float]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n11.InString [String]
raw_output:

PARENT: Actor

VAR Y: Float = 2.0
VAR Z: Float = 3.0
GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n4: PrintString
NODE n5: VariableGet [VarName=Y]
NODE n6: PrintString
NODE n7: VariableGet [VarName=Z]
NODE n8: PrintString
NODE n9: AddFloat
NODE n10: AddFloat
NODE n11: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.A -> n4.Execute
DATA n3.Value -> n4.InString [String]
EXEC n2.B -> n6.Execute
DATA n5.Value -> n6.InString [String]
EXEC n2.C -> n8.Execute
DATA n7.Value -> n8.InString [String]
EXEC n2.D -> n11.Execute
DATA n3.Value -> n9.A [Float]
DATA n5.Value -> n9.B [Float]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n10.A [Float]
DATA n7.Value -> n10.B [Float]

instruction: Create a Blueprint with float Health at 100. On AnyDamage subtract the damage, check if health is below zero, and if so print Dead and destroy the actor.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_DamageCheck
PARENT: Actor
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Health]
NODE n5: LessThan [B=0.0]
NODE n6: Branch
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Dead"]
NODE n8: DestroyActor
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Float]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.A [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n6.True -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_DamageCheck
PARENT: Actor
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat
NODE n4: LessThan [B=0.0]
NODE n5: Branch
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="Dead"]
NODE n7: DestroyActor
EXEC n1.Then -> n5.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n5.True -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_DamageCheck
PARENT: Actor
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat
NODE n4: LessThan [B=0.0]
NODE n5: Branch
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="Dead"]
NODE n7: DestroyActor
EXEC n1.Then -> n5.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n5.True -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

instruction: Create a Blueprint with float Score at 0. On BeginPlay add 50 to Score, then check if Score is greater than or equal to 100. If yes print Winner, if no print Keep Going.

VAR Score: Float = 0.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Score]
NODE n3: AddFloat [B=50.0]
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Score]
NODE n5: GreaterEqual [B=100.0]
NODE n6: Branch
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Winner"]
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="Keep Going"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Float]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.A [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n6.True -> n7.Execute
EXEC n6.False -> n8.Execute
actual_dsl:

GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay

NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Score]
NODE n5: GreaterEqual [B=100.0]

NODE n8: PrintString [InString="Keep Going"]

EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n6.True -> n7.Execute
EXEC n6.False -> n8.Execute

instruction: Create a Blueprint with float Temperature. On BeginPlay check if Temperature is greater than 100. If true print Boiling. Check if less than 0 and print Freezing. Otherwise print Normal.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_TempCheck
PARENT: Actor
VAR Temperature: Float = 50.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Temperature]
NODE n3: GreaterThan [B=100.0]
NODE n4: Branch
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="Boiling"]
NODE n6: LessThan [B=0.0]
NODE n7: Branch
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="Freezing"]
NODE n9: PrintString [InString="Normal"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n4.True -> n5.Execute
EXEC n4.False -> n7.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n6.A [Float]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n7.True -> n8.Execute
EXEC n7.False -> n9.Execute
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_TempCheck
PARENT: Actor
VAR Temperature: Float = 50.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Temperature]
NODE n3: GreaterThan [B=100.0]
NODE n4: Branch
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="Boiling"]
NODE n6: LessThan [B=0.0]
NODE n7: Branch
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="Freezing"]
NODE n9: PrintString [InString="Normal"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute

DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n4.True -> n5.Execute
EXEC n4.False -> n7.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n6.A [Float]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n7.True -> n8.Execute
EXEC n7.False -> n9.Execute

instruction: Create a character Blueprint with Health at 100 and Name as Hero. On BeginPlay print name. On AnyDamage subtract damage from health and set it. If health below 0 print Dead then destroy. On Overlap add 25 to health.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_FullCharacter
PARENT: Character
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
VAR Name: String = "Hero"
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Name]
NODE n3: PrintString
NODE n4: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n5: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n6: SubtractFloat
NODE n7: VariableSet [VarName=Health]
NODE n8: LessThan [B=0.0]
NODE n9: Branch
NODE n10: PrintString [InString="Dead"]
NODE n11: DestroyActor
NODE n12: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n13: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n14: AddFloat [B=25.0]
NODE n15: VariableSet [VarName=Health]
EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.InString [String]
EXEC n4.Then -> n7.Execute
DATA n5.Value -> n6.A [Float]
DATA n4.Damage -> n6.B [Float]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Value [Float]
EXEC n7.Then -> n9.Execute
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n8.A [Float]
DATA n8.ReturnValue -> n9.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n9.True -> n10.Execute
EXEC n10.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n12.Then -> n15.Execute
DATA n13.Value -> n14.A [Float]
DATA n14.ReturnValue -> n15.Value [Float]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_FullCharacter

instruction: Create a Blueprint with integer Counter at 0 and bool IsActive at true. On pressing Interact, check IsActive. If true, add 1 to Counter, print the counter, then if counter equals 5 set IsActive to false and print Limit Reached.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CounterLimit
PARENT: Actor
VAR Counter: Int = 0
VAR IsActive: Bool = true
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_InputAction [ActionName="Interact"]
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=IsActive]
NODE n3: Branch
NODE n4: VariableGet [VarName=Counter]
NODE n5: AddInt [B=1]
NODE n6: VariableSet [VarName=Counter]
NODE n7: PrintString
NODE n8: EqualEqual_IntInt [B=5]
NODE n9: Branch
NODE n10: VariableSet [VarName=IsActive]
NODE n11: PrintString [InString="Limit Reached"]

DATA n2.Value -> n3.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n3.True -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [Int]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Value [Int]
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n7.InString [String]
EXEC n7.Then -> n9.Execute
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n8.A [Int]
DATA n8.ReturnValue -> n9.Condition [Bool]
EXEC n9.True -> n10.Execute
DATA false -> n10.Value [Bool]
EXEC n10.Then -> n11.Execute

instruction: Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay runs a ForLoop from 0 to 9 and prints the index each iteration. After the loop completes, print Done.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_LoopPrint
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: ForLoop [FirstIndex=0, LastIndex=9]
NODE n3: PrintString
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Done"]
EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.LoopBody -> n3.Execute
DATA n2.Index -> n3.InString [String]
EXEC n2.Completed -> n4.Execute
